candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row tied to cost of revenues. However, the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' appears to be a total that already includes it, because the adjacent 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value' plus this D&A row approximately equals 'Cost of goods sold' in the visible years.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is an R&D-related D&A row, not COGS-related, so it does not belong in the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Do not add separate COGS D&A. 'Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues' is shown as a component beneath/alongside the selected total 'Cost of goods sold' and would double count if added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row potentially relevant to the selected XSGA components. But the row has no visible values in the excerpt, and the selected 'Research and development costs' row is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding a separate R&D D&A row is not warranted here.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This D&A row belongs to cost of revenues / COGS, not SG&A or other XSGA components.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A-related D&A row should be added. The only possible XSGA D&A row is the R&D D&A line, but it is blank in the excerpt and R&D is already handled symmetrically through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
